nasb.text: He presented another parable to them, saying, “The kingdom of heaven is like a mustard seed, which a man took and sowed in his field;

esv.text: He put another parable before them, saying, “The kingdom of heaven is like a grain of mustard seed that a man took and sowed in his field.

cnv.text: 耶穌又對他們講了另外一個比喻，說：“天國好像一粒芥菜種，人拿去把它種在田裡。

ccb.text: 耶稣又给他们讲了一个比喻：“天国就像一粒芥菜种，人把它种在田里。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们讲了另一个比喻说：“天国好比一粒芥菜种子，有人拿去种在他的田里。
